_units: USD per million tokens — current Anthropic list price (pay-as-you-go API value).
_note: Fable 5 (claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5) is 10/50. Opus 4.6+ is 5/25 (the retired 4.0/4.1 was 15/75). cache_write = input x cache_write_multiplier (5-min TTL), cache_read = input x cache_read_multiplier. These list prices back the cost golden vectors in tests/methodology-vectors.json; live reports take cost straight from tokscale (multi-provider), not from this file.
